attempt: Move from local feature tests to stateful certificates: finite computations are useful only when they identify the next state variable or global theorem needed to block infinite obstruction paths.
obstruction: Parity-blind statistics can stutter across bounded-gap states without forcing exact gap 2.
candidate_theorem: A parity-sensitive selector state machine keeps exact gap-2 mass positive while rejecting wider-gap-only models.
next_experiment: Construct parity countermodel states and require exact-pair mass to survive every transition.
claim_boundary: No twin-prime proof and no certified twin-prime counterexample.
